query: low resolution pixelated mosaic blocky digital image
message: sub:digital_artifacts/pixelation — anti_aesthetic — pixel mosaic, blocky low-res, color-cell grids

response.objective_caption: A close-up photograph of the Microsoft Windows logo displayed on a screen, composed of four bright panes in orange, green, blue, and yellow separated by thick black curved borders, with a visible grid of RGB subpixels across the colored surfaces.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A soft-focus macro photograph of the Microsoft Windows logo rendered at an extreme scale, filling the frame with four bright panes in orange, green, blue, and yellow separated by thick black curved borders. The image is blurred throughout, and the extreme magnification reveals the underlying RGB pixel grid, causing the familiar icon to dissolve into abstract color fields and making the screen's subpixel structure prominently visible.
